goal: Require high-risk and permission-sensitive harness patch promotion approvals to be scoped to promotion and at least as fresh as the candidate eval.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: A permission or high-risk harness patch can reuse an apply approval or an approval from before candidate eval evidence, so promotion appears human-approved without approval of the evaluated candidate.
